shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch holding a clean axios call with a crossed-out tangled XHR callback mess in the background.
assets.caption: Hatch holding a clean axios call with a crossed-out tangled XHR callback mess in the background.
assets.prompt: axios | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) holding a simple one-line code snippet — "axios.get('/api/data')" — with a tangled XHR callback mess floating in the background, crossed out. Background is warm cream. Hatch looks calm and satisfied. No speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing at the contrast between verbose XHR code and clean axios syntax.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing at the contrast between verbose XHR code and clean axios syntax.
assets.prompt: axios | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose: standing beside a 2014-era code editor split into two panels — left panel shows 20 lines of XHR boilerplate; right panel shows 3 lines of axios. Hatch gestures at the contrast. Cream background, no copy. Watermark same as hero. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. assets.alt: Hatch explaining axios's isomorphic adapter design — same API, different runtimes underneath.
assets.caption: Hatch explaining axios's isomorphic adapter design — same API, different runtimes underneath.
assets.prompt: axios | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, gesturing at a diagram showing the isomorphic layer: browser icon on the left connected to axios, which connects to XHR; Node.js icon on the right connected to axios, which connects to the http module. Same API at top, different adapters underneath. Clean, minimal, cream background. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. The lesson is about timing. Cream background, no copy. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
